title: Blade Addons
description: A dungeons mod made to port dungeons features to the newer Minecraft versions.
body:
A Hypixel Skyblock mod to port useful features from mods like Valley Addons to make 1.21+ a more pleasant experience. 

In general the mod adds features like:
- Various tick timers
- Dungeon splits
- multiple visual changes to bring 1.8.9 with you like disable glowing or hide item cooldowns
- old sounds like old ragnarock sound
- and many more features

To reach me for questions or general info about the mod join the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/u4UsbmKTrz) server or send a dm to blademastergabe.
